name: Morphine sulfate
description: Opioid analgesic. Yana ba da taimako mai tasiri mai tasiri amma yana haifar da vasodilation da hypotension - yi amfani da hankali a cikin girgizar jini. An fi son Ketamine a cikin saitunan fama. Yi amfani da morphine kawai a cikin majinyata masu tsayin daka.
indications: Matsakaici-zuwa zafi mai tsanani a cikin marasa lafiya na hemodynamically barga
Ba layin farko ba a cikin TCCC -- fi son ketamine
dose: 2-4 mg IV/IO q4h PRN. Titrate don tasiri. IM: 5-10 mg q4h PRN.
contraindications: Rashin kwanciyar hankali na hemodynamic / bugun jini
Raunin kai tare da canza LOC (dangi)
warnings: Yana haifar da vasodilation -- na iya kara tsananta bugun jini. Yi la'akari da BP kafin da bayan.
Bacin rai na numfashi -- yawan saka idanu.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV q2-4h PRN. Matsakaicin kashi ɗaya na 2mg IV a cikin yaro mai butulci.
pediatric.note: Kula da yawan numfashi a hankali. Neonates suna da hankali sosai.

obstetric.note: Ketare mahaifa. Bacin rai na jariri mai yiwuwa idan an ba shi a cikin sa'o'i 2-4 na haihuwa. Yi naloxone a shirye don jariri.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / PHTLS
